title: manifest declares an integrity.manifest_checksum that doesn't match
rationale: Per spec §16, security.integrity.manifest_checksum is the hash of the canonicalized manifest itself — the integrity anchor that signature verification chains against. A mismatch means either the manifest was tampered with after signing, OR the writer computed the hash wrong. Verifier MUST reject with a clear pointer to the mismatch.

files.document.md: # Manifest checksum is all-zeros, won't match the canonicalized JSON.
